headline: Braze, GitLab, and Manhattan Associates Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after Treasury yields cooled and risk-on rotation lifted AI-linked growth names, helping the SaaS sector recover from the previous day's Intuit-driven sell-off.

headline: Why The Trade Desk (TTD) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of digital advertising platform The Trade Desk (NASDAQ:TTD) jumped 3.1% in the afternoon session after Treasury yields cooled and risk-on rotation lifted AI-linked growth names, helping the sector recover from the previous day's Intuit-driven sell-off.
